title: Adversarial Machine Learning Path
description: Build fluency in Adversarial Machine Learning inside Security & Robustness by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Robustness Metrics
steps.summary: Robustness Metrics belongs to the Security & Robustness area of AI/ML, within Adversarial Machine Learning. It sits inside Security & Robustness / Adversarial Machine Learning. Start after Robustness and Model Robustness. It opens into Robustness Metrics Techniques and Robustness Metrics (e.g., Adversarial Robustness).
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Adversarial Robustness
steps.summary: Adversarial Robustness belongs to the Security & Robustness area of AI/ML, within Adversarial Machine Learning. It sits inside Security & Robustness / Adversarial Machine Learning. Start after Robustness and Model Robustness. It opens into adversarial robustness evaluation and Adversarial Robustness Techniques.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Adversarial Robustness Techniques
steps.summary: Adversarial Robustness Techniques belongs to the Security & Robustness area of AI/ML, within Adversarial Machine Learning. It sits inside Security & Robustness / Adversarial Machine Learning. Start after Adversarial Robustness and Robustness. It opens into Adversarial Robustness Techniques Extensions and Adversarial Robustness Techniques Extensions Techniques.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.
